# MPP32

> Machine-payable API platform for Solana token intelligence and third-party API monetization. All endpoints use HTTP 402 via the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP). Payments settle on Tempo in pathUSD.

## Solana Token Intelligence Oracle

- [POST /api/intelligence](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/api/intelligence): Returns alpha score, rug risk, whale activity, market data, and social signals for any Solana token. 0.008 pathUSD per query.
- [POST /api/intelligence/demo](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/api/intelligence/demo): Free demo endpoint, rate-limited to 10 req/min. Same data as the paid endpoint.

## API Proxy Marketplace

- [GET /api/submissions](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/api/submissions): Browse all listed MPP services. Returns name, slug, category, price, and payment address.
- [POST /api/proxy/{slug}](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/api/proxy): Payment-gated proxy to any listed service. Pay via MPP, get upstream response.
- [GET /api/proxy/{slug}/info](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/api/proxy): Public metadata for any listed service (no payment required).

## Discovery

- [OpenAPI Spec](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/openapi.json): Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec with x-payment-info extensions for automated agent discovery.
- [MPPScan Listing](https://www.mppscan.com): Registered on the MPP protocol explorer.
- [Health Check](https://mpp32.vibecode.run/health): Server status and database connectivity.

## Integration

Install the mppx SDK to make paid requests:

```
npm install mppx
```

The 402 flow: Send request -> receive payment challenge -> pay on Tempo -> retry with authorization header -> receive data.

## Builder Platform

API providers can list their own services on MPP32:
- Submit your HTTP endpoint, set your price, receive 100% of payments directly to your wallet
- [Build Page](https://mpp32.org/build): Submit a new service
- [Ecosystem](https://mpp32.org/ecosystem): Browse all listed services

## Links

- Website: https://mpp32.org
- API Base: https://mpp32.vibecode.run
- MPP Protocol: https://paymentauth.org
- mppx SDK: https://github.com/wevm/mppx
